changes_summary.lib/ollama/client.ts: healthCheck() tunnel_used now derived from getBaseUrl() (harness_config-aware) instead of process.env
changes_summary.lib/orchestrator/daytime-tick.ts: runDaytimeTick() calls hydrateOllamaConfig() before checks run; getTunnelUsed() uses getBaseUrl()
changes_summary.lib/harness/smoke-tests/ollama-health.ts: runOllamaHealthSmoke() calls hydrateOllamaConfig() + getBaseUrl() instead of reading process.env directly
changes_summary.tests/ollama-client.test.ts: Added regression test: tunnel_used=true when harness_config has tunnel URL and process.env is absent

grounding_checkpoint_required: 1. INSERT INTO harness_config (key, value) VALUES ('OLLAMA_TUNNEL_URL', '<cloudflare-tunnel-url>'). 2. Trigger daytime-tick: curl -s -X GET https://lepios-one.vercel.app/api/cron/daytime-tick -H 'Authorization: Bearer <CRON_SECRET>' — confirm tunnel_used:true in response. 3. SELECT meta FROM agent_events WHERE action='ollama.health' ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 1 — expect tunnel_used=true, base_url matches harness_config value.
